final:
// // This module implements an 8-bit Johnson counter with enable and synchronous reset. The counter shifts right and inserts the complement of the LSB at the MSB on the rising edge of the clock if the 'enable' signal is high. The counter should reset to 0 when the synchronous reset (sreset) is high. The counter value should be output to the 'count' signal.
module top_module
(
    input clk,
    input sreset,
    input enable,
    output reg [7:0] count
);always @(posedge clk)
        if (sreset) begin
            count <= 8'b00000000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= {count[6:0], ~count[7]};
        end
endmodule
